name: io.github.mcpwright/fred-mcp
title: FRED (economic data)
description: FRED economic time series + ALFRED vintages: data as originally published, before revisions.

environmentVariables.name: FRED_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your own free FRED API key (get one at fred.stlouisfed.org/docs/api/api_key_request.html). Keys are personal under the FRED API Terms of Use.

environmentVariables.name: FRED_MCP_USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Descriptive User-Agent identifying your deployment. Optional.
